sourceTitle: Journal of Zhejiang University - Policy Statement and Author Disclosure Requirements for the Use of Generative AI
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 3. Obligation for Transparent Disclosure: Any substantive use of generative AI tools during the preparation of a manuscript must be disclosed explicitly and in detail within the paper. Failure to disclose such use, if discovered, will be treated as a form of academic misconduct.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: Substantive generative AI use during manuscript preparation must be disclosed explicitly and in detail.
rightsNote: Official source page retains its original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
